# BI-260003: Implement agreed public-site information architecture

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260003
- Title: Implement landing-page section model and navigation structure
- Persona/Actor: Public visitor evaluating Crystord
- Value statement: For a first-time or returning visitor, deliver a clear page structure and
  navigation model to achieve faster understanding, easy support/legal discovery, and direct app
  sign-in access.
- Context: Section 5 decisions are accepted and need to be implemented in Astro templates and page
  content.
- Problem statement: Without a fixed structure, page composition and navigation may drift and create
  inconsistent user journeys.
- Expected outcome: The public site reflects the accepted multi-page IA and section ordering.
- Success metric(s): Users can find sign-in, add-on, support, and legal destinations in one click
  from navigation or footer.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Landing page implements the accepted section order.
  - Standalone pages are linked in top navigation and footer.
  - Footer includes Google Add-on, Support, Privacy, Terms, Contact, and YouTube.
  - Sign-in control label is `Sign in to Crystord App` and routes to app domain.
- Non-goals: Implementing SaaS backend authentication changes.
- Constraints: Static-site output only; no server runtime requirements for the public site.
- Dependencies: Copy finalization for each section and page.
- Risks/assumptions: Legal/support copy may require review before final publication.
- Validation approach: Manual navigation walkthrough and route verification across desktop/mobile.
- Priority score: High
- Target window: Next implementation milestone
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260003.md
  - ADR: ADR-260003.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
